title: main.c error gotos skip LED turn-off leaving it lit
description: Location: main.c:106-126,142-146. When LoRa init fails (goto main_loop), the code skips the gpio_pin_set_dt(led, 0) at line 144. The LED remains lit, giving users a false indication that initialization succeeded. Since LED is set to 1 on startup and 0 on ready, the lit LED incorrectly signals ready state even though LoRa failed. Either turn off LED before goto, or move LED-off before the error-prone section.
close_reason: Fixed: gotos now target led_off label which turns off LED before falling through to main_loop
